prompt: There's an event titled 'KinBench Weekly Sync' next week in the Calendar. Find which day of the week it falls on and write the day name (Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Thursday/Friday/Saturday/Sunday) to ~/Desktop/kinbench/020-day.txt. Fast path: cerebellum 'calendar find_events_with_summary "KinBench Weekly Sync" ~/Desktop/kinbench/020-day.txt' then derive the weekday from the start-date string.
